engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is deciding on a PLACE to eat — photos, menus, locations, hours and authenticity ('EAT TÜRKİYE', 'Experience the Heart of Türkiye') are the proof. No defined expertise sold and no portfolio of work; browsing the venue/menu IS the decision.

goal.one_action: Reserve/book a table (or pick a location to dine at)

structure.archetype_note: Multi-location restaurant group site: home pitch → about/story → per-location grid → per-location PDF menus → contact form. RESERVE/BOOK NOW CTAs funnel to /locations rather than an on-site booking engine.

mapped.observed_as: Experience the Heart of Türkiye in London

unmapped.observed: Menu section that is a grid of six per-location downloadable PDF menus (no on-page dishes/prices)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Not a pricing table or menu-list — it is a set of downloadable per-venue PDF documents standing in for the menu

proposed_new.name: practitioner-profiles
proposed_new.evidence: Six London venues each with their own location card/subpage (Green Lanes, Park Royal, Kentish Town, Walthamstow, Finchley, Chingford), per-location addresses/phones/booking — a multi-branch per-location profile pattern the closed vocab cannot express.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial — per-location addresses/phones/hours/booking links and map embeds were genuinely absent from the static fetch (menu is PDF downloads, location detail subpages not crawled), so the reservation mechanism and map-hours capability are inferred rather than observed.

gap_findings: Multi-location restaurant group: one brand, N venues each with own address/hours/menu/booking — closest registry match is practitioner-profiles but that was coined for staff/branch bios, not a food-venue chain.
Menu-as-downloadable-PDF-per-location has no clean section id (mapped to pricing) — restaurants without on-page menus are common; a menu-download pattern is under-expressed.
Reservation CTA funnels to a location chooser with no captured on-site or delegated booking engine — the actual booking mechanism (per-venue) is indeterminate from this fetch.
